text:
There is one primary overview paper specifically regarding AlphaFold3 published in 2025, alongside other AlphaFold-related research.

### Recent AlphaFold3 and Related Research (2025)

*   **AlphaFold3 Overview**: An article titled "AlphaFold3: An Overview of Applications and Performance Insights" provides insights into the applications and performance of the model [PMID:40332289].
*   **AlphaFold-based Docking**: Research utilizing AlphaFold-based AI docking has been applied to reveal AMPK/SIRT1-TFEB pathway modulation by traditional Chinese medicine in metabolic-associated fatty liver disease [PMID:39832686].
*   **Other AlphaFold Research**: Other 2025 publications include studies on AlphaFold2 SLiM screens for LC3-LIR interactions [PMID:40320752] and research regarding Boltz-1 and Boltz-2 models [PMID:39605745, PMID:40667369].
